---
id: health-check
title: "Health check"
description: "Returns 200 OK with `{status: 'ok'}` when the node is operational. No authentication required. Suitable for load balancer health probes."
sidebar_label: "Health check"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

  method={"get"}
  path={"/healthz"}
  context={"endpoint"}

</MethodEndpoint>



Returns 200 OK with `{status: "ok"}` when the node is operational. No authentication required. Suitable for load balancer health probes.
